items.name: Kitsune Fox Kimono Suit
items.description:
Don’t forget to like 🦊


A stylish Kitsune Fox Kimono Suit with an elegant, mystical design and detailed patterns. Inspired by traditional Japanese aesthetics, this outfit gives your avatar a unique fox spirit look. Comes in multiple colors so you can match your own style.
